DEPT 1/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ATNY STEVEN LITTMAN PRESENT WITH PLTF BELLE WEI. DEFTS JUDITH HOLMES AND MARA VALLE PRESENT IN PRO PER WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER MEGAN GALAS. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLMES, JUDITH VALLE, MARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 468 BRAZIL AVENUE (UPPER UNIT), SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,874.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,874.50, STAYED UNTIL JUL-30-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICT UNTIL MIDNIGHT, 7-30-96.
